title: verbascum speciosum subsp. speciosum
intro: Verbascum speciosum subsp. speciosum, also known as the Yellow Mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Yellow Mullein include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Yellow Mullein can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, soothe skin irritations, and support respiratory health.
